chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-650 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 23.05.2023 Mr. Sajjad Ali Gopang advocate for petitioners along with petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. AG Sindh and Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh along with SIP Muhammad Ashraf PS BalooJaQuba. ----- IO is present so also petitioners and their counsel. IO submits that he has already recorded statement of petitioner No.1 confirming her marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own freewill and choice, hence he has already disposed of the case in ‘C’ class and submitted such summary before the Magistrate concerned. Learned AAG has filed such report which is taken on record. Petitioners and their counsel are satisfied. Accordingly, this petition in the terms as stated above is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
